title: Gooey Cheese Dumplings
description: A Russian-inspired dish featuring gooey cheese-filled dumplings. Delicious and easy to make, this dish is perfect for a cozy evening.
instructions: 1. Preheat a large pot of water and add a pinch of salt.
2. Bring the water to a boil and cook the dumplings according to the package instructions.
3. While the dumplings are cooking, mix together the gooey cheese and Russian cheese in a bowl.
4. Once the dumplings are done, remove them from the water with a slotted spoon and add to the cheese mixture.
5. Place the dumplings in a baking dish and top with additional cheese if desired.
6. Bake in a preheated oven at 375°F (190°C) for 15-20 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
